exercises.code:
nombres = ["Ana", "Luis", "María"]
edades = [30, 25, 40]
for n, e in zip(nombres, edades):
    print(f"{n}={e}")
print(list(zip(nombres, edades[:1])))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory zip stops at shortest; exercise asks observe silent zip with edades[:1].
Demo zip_strict raises ValueError when lengths differ.

exercises.code:
lines = ["r1", "r2", "", "r3"]
i = 0
out = []
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i]
    i += 1
    if line == "":
        break
    out.append(line)
print(out)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Demo while + break on sentinel; result ['r1','r2'].

MAX = 3
while intentos < MAX:
    intentos += 1
    print(f"intento {intentos}")
print("done", intentos)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory update control each iteration; 3 attempts then done 3.

exercises.code:
cola = ["job1", "job2", "job3"]
while cola:
    job = cola.pop(0)
    print(job)
    if job == "job2":
        print("PAUSE")
        break
print("rest", cola)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints while cola pop(0); break on job2; rest [job3].
Theory/demo continue for blank lines; only Lima Cusco.

exercises.code:
codes = [200, 200, 500, 200]
n_ok = 0
for c in codes:
    if c >= 500:
        print("STOP")
        break
    print("ok")
    n_ok += 1
print("n_ok", n_ok)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Demo break on ERROR/fatal; n_ok=2 before 500.

exercises.code:
buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []
while True:
    if i > 10:
        raise RuntimeError("guard")
    line = buf[i]
    i += 1
    if line == "END":
        break
    out.append(line)
print(out)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory while True with clear break; demo END sentinel; guard max i.
Demo counters pattern; expected 2 1 3.

exercises.code:
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if not n_total:
        return None
    n_rej = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_rej / n_total

print(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]))
print(tasa_reject([]))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory if n_total else None; avoid ZeroDivisionError.
Theory search with break; tests 1 C2.

nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
cuadrados = [x * x for x in nums]
pares = [x for x in nums if x % 2 == 0]
print(cuadrados)
print(pares)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory list comprehension form; hints squares and pairs.

exercises.code:
rows = [{"id": "C1", "status": "accept"}, {"id": "C2", "status": "reject"}, {"id": "C3", "status": "accept"}, {"id": "C4", "status": "reject"}]
by = {r["id"]: r["status"] for r in rows}
reject_ids = [r["id"] for r in rows if r["status"] == "reject"]
tasa = len(reject_ids) / len(rows)
print(by)
print(reject_ids, tasa)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory dict/list comps; tasa 0.5 with 2 rejects of 4.

for i, val in enumerate(vals):
    if val > 0:
        s += val
    print(i, val, s)
print("final", s)

for f in filas:

print(n)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Bug is n+=1 twice; one increment yields 3.
Demo TRACE print each iteration showing counter growth.
Theory/demo linear n quadratic n*n → 5 25.
Theory range(len) is 0..n-1; range(1,len+1) IndexError.

exercises.code:
sts = ["reject", "accept", "reject", "reject", "accept"]
n_reject = 0
for s in sts:
    if s == "reject":
        n_reject += 1
n = len(sts)
tasa = n_reject / n
print(n_reject, tasa)
print("nota: O(n) basta para la tasa; no hace falta contar pares reject-reject O(n²)")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Theory: one O(n) pass for rate; avoid nested loops; 3 rejects → 0.6.
